title: WNBA draft: Grading Azzi Fudd to Wings and every team's night
content: One team set the curve with an A+. Three got A grades, including Dallas for picking Azzi Fudd. But one got a D.

title: Fudd goes No. 1, reunites with Bueckers in Dallas
content: Azzi Fudd is on her way to Dallas as the No. 1 pick in the WNBA draft with a $500,000 payday waiting for the former UConn star. Minnesota took Olivia Miles of TCU with the No. 2 pick.

title: Valks GM: Agreed to trade before Johnson picked
content: Golden State GM Ohemaa Nyanin told ESPN that the Valkyries and Storm agreed to trade draft picks before the selection of Flau'jae Johnson.

title: UCLA's 5 1st-round picks, 6 overall set records
content: National champion UCLA became the first team to have five first-round picks in the WNBA draft -- Lauren Betts, Gabriela Jaquez, Kiki Rice, Angela Dugalic and Gianna Kneepkens -- and six overall, with Charlisse Leger-Walker taken in the second round.

title: Judge, Trout each homer twice, but Yanks prevail
content: On a night when Los Angeles star Mike Trout hit two home runs against New York, Yankees star Aaron Judge also homered twice in what turned into a heavyweight slugfest, one that the host team won 11-10 at Yankee Stadium in a series opener Monday.

title: ESPN's Vitale announces melanoma diagnosis
content: ESPN Hall of Fame broadcaster Dick Vitale has announced he has melanoma in his lung and liver cavity and will be starting immunotherapy soon.

title: Red Sox ace Crochet hammered for 11 runs, 9 hits
content: Red Sox ace Garrett Crochet was battered by the Twins for 11 runs -- 10 earned -- in 1⅔ innings Monday night.

title: Quick, 40, 3-time Cup champion, plays last game
content: In his final game after nearly two decades in the NHL, goaltender Jonathan Quick, 40, who won the Stanley Cup three times in a decorated career, made 14 saves in the New York Rangers' 3-2 loss to the Florida Panthers on Monday night at Amerant Bank Arena.

title: Ex-Cardinals coach, Titans assistant McGinnis dies
content: Former Tennessee assistant Dave McGinnis, who also served as head coach for the Arizona Cardinals in a decorated career on the NFL sidelines, died at 74 on Monday with his family by his side at Ascension St. Thomas Midtown Hospital, the Titans announced.

title: 🥶 'Drake's seats froze': Raptors lean into buzz
content: The seats underwent a pregame makeover presumably for the rollout of the Canadian rapper's upcoming album, "Iceman."

content: The stars took on WNBA draft night in New York City in their best outfits before hearing their names called.

content: From teammates and opponents to coaches, officials and staff, those who were there remember how Bryant's last game became something no one expected -- and no one will forget.

title: Eagles, A.J. Brown intrigue increases as NFL draft nears
content: The Eagles haven't been highly incentivized to move Brown to this point, in large part due to the financials.

content: Strongest arm? Fastest offensive and defensive playmakers? Quickest first step? Let's hand out superlatives for this NFL draft class.

content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

content: Leeds United's win over Manchester United at Old Trafford has left Michael Carrick's side wondering how much better can they get to finish off the Premier League season.

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC's first loss of 2026 knocks them off the top
content: LAFC had been practically perfect in 2026, but the Angelenos first loss of the year cleared room for a new No. 1 in this edition of MLS Power Rankings.

content: After seeing a six-shot lead erased on Saturday, McIlroy still found a way to secure his second green jacket.﻿

content: Odds for next four golf majors: 2026 PGA Championship, U.S. Open and the Open Championship, 2027 Masters.

content: The heavyweight division is buzzing again thanks to Tyson Fury calling out Anthony Joshua and Deontay Wilder's return.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern, Barça eye move for Milan's Leão
content: Two of Europe's powerhouses are competing for the signature of AC Milan's Rafael Leão. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Postpone West Bengal polls until all voters are on rolls, says Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury
content: Five-time Congress MP and former leader of the party in Lok Sabha Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury says incomplete electoral rolls and the Election Commission of India’s SIR process threaten free and fair elections ahead of the West Bengal Assembly elections 2026

title: Nitish recommends Cabinet dissolution before meeting Guv. to resign as Bihar CM | LIVE updates
content: Nitish Kumar, who has been Chief Minister for the past 21 years, is likely to tender his resignation today

title: Mumbai to roll out first non-AC closed-door local train to tackle overcrowding
content: The Integral Coach Factory in Chennai developed the 12-car train featuring compartments, large windows, reasonable leg space, and space to luggage

title: ‘Will not remain silent’: T.N. CM Stalin warns of massive protest against delimitation
content: “Tamil Nadu will come to a standstill. It will register its protest vehemently. Every family will come out to the streets. We will organise a big protest under my leadership,” he said in a video message

title: U.P. announces interim hike in minimum wages across categories after Noida protest
content: Unskilled workers in Noida and Ghaziabad will get a 21% increase in their wages; those in municipalities will receive a 15% raise, while workers in other areas will see a 9% increase

title: Search intensifies for man feared fallen into stream in J&K’s Ramban after assault by cow vigilantes
content: A Special Investigation Team has been constituted and four people have been arrested in connection with the case, which triggered widespread protests and tension in the district along the Jammu-Srinagar National Highway

title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE updates: AAP's Arvind Kejriwal to campaign in support of DMK in Tamil Nadu
content: The Aam Aadmi Party has not put up any candidate for the Assembly poll race in Tamil Nadu, choosing to support the Secular Progressive Alliance instead

title: Udhayanidhi Stalin’s assets: Plea in Madras High Court seeks I-T dept. probe
content: Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan slated to hear the case, filed by a voter from Chepauk-Triplicane constituency, on Wednesday

title: Stark reality of Viksit Bharat: Rahul Gandhi slams Centre over Noida workers’ protest
content: “What unfolded on the streets of Noida yesterday was the final cry of this nation’s workers - a voice that went unheard at every turn, a voice weary from ceaseless pleading,” Rahul Gandhi said

title: Telangana sizzles as temperatures cross 43°C; all 33 districts record above 41°C
content: Aloor in Nizamabad is hottest in Telangana as it records 43.2°C. Maximum temperature in Hyderabad is 41°C.

title: PM Modi meets Vice-President on Tamil New Year
content: Separately, Mr. Radhakrishnan greeted people on the occasion of Puthandu, Baisakhi, Rongali Bihu, Maha Bishuba Pana Sankranti, Poila Boishakh and Vishu

title: BCYP chief Bode Ramachandra Yadav’s hunger strike enters third day in Guntur
content: BCYP leader Bode Ramachandra Yadav’s hunger strike entered its third day in Guntur as protesters blocked the national highway and 30 were shifted to a police station

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Congress releases manifesto; D.K. Shivakumar hits out at Vijay’s remarks
content: He terms the TVK president an ‘immature politician’ in response to the latter claiming that the ‘real Congress’ was with his party at a public meeting in Tirunelveli recently

title: New Prachand Light Combat Helicopter production line inaugurated in Tumakuru
content: The New Helicopter Facility is a state-of-the-art greenfield facility established for the production of Light Utility Helicopter (LUH) and Prachand LCH

title: T.N. Assembly election: CPI(M) manifesto pitches electoral reforms, State autonomy, and pro-labour measures
content: It also calls for a complete ban on corporate donations to political parties and opposes the privatisation of public sector undertakings

title: ‘I consider all the criticism coming my way as stepping stones in life’ NTK transgender candidate Roshini
content: S. Roshini, the Villivakkam candidate of the Naam Tamilar Katchi (NTK) and the party’s transgender face in the fray, takes her campaign trail through its narrow streets.

title: Tamil Nadu elections: Stalin interacts with voters during morning walk in K.V. Kuppam constituency
content: Mr. Stalin set out on a morning walk in the K.V. Kuppam town area, where he stopped at a small tea shop, interacted with locals, and canvassed votes in favour of the DMK and its allies

title: Transport Minister urges Telangana RTC employee unions to withdraw proposed strike, hold talks
content: Ill-timed strike would affect passengers and and affect the organisation’s recovery, says Ponnam Prabhakar

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: party manifestos
content: This is a compilation of poll manifestos released by prominent political parties in Tamil Nadu ahead of the State Assembly election scheduled to be held on April 23, 2026

title: ‘Complete mockery of democracy’: Congress slams govt for not sharing Constitution amendment bills
content: Congress's whip in the Lok Sabha, Manickam Tagore, also slammed the government over the "special session" being "rushed", right at the peak of election campaigning in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal

title: SC agrees to hear plea to implement disability-sensitive guidelines for welfare insurance schemes
content: The plea has sought a direction that claims under such welfare insurance schemes be decided on a case-by-case basis through reasoned, humane and non-mechanical decision-making processes

title: Hyderabad paediatrician Sivaranjani Santosh quits IAP citing lack of institutional support after receiving legal notice
content: She points out that global paediatric bodies advise caution regarding long-term use of artificial sweeteners in children, citing insufficient evidence on their impact on gut microbiota and potential metabolic risks, including diabetes

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Vijay’s hologram makes its way into campaign to impress Kumbakonam voters
content: Hologram of TVK party chief and actor Vijay accompanies R. Vinoth, the party’s candidate for Kumbakonam constituency during his campaign

title: Davanagere bypoll: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah’s political secretary Naseer Ahmed sacked
content: Although the party high command is believed to have asked Mr. Ahmed to step down voluntarily, he declined to do so

title: AP PGECET-2026 hall tickets out April 15; exam from April 28 to 30 in 13 Andhra Pradesh districts
content: AP PGECET-2026 will be held from April 28 to 30 with two daily sessions. Hall tickets available from April 15 on the APSCHE website

title: Meghalaya yields new burrowing reed snake
content: The Calamaria garoensis used to be identified as the Calamaria pavimentata until its identification as a distinct species

title: BJP manifestos: 28.73% of promises made by party in poll-bound States rely on Centre
content: Banking on Modi-led government at the Centre, BJP has made tall promises on infrastructure, health, education in Kerala, Assam, Puducherry and West Bengal

title: Two men killed as speeding car overturns thrice in Kadapa’s Gopavaram
content: Two men from Badvel died after their speeding car overturned near Haritha Hotel in Madakalavaripalle village, Gopavaram mandal, Kadapa district

title: Court sends I-PAC director Chandel to 10 days ED custody
content: In a major action weeks ahead of the West Bengal Assembly polls, ED arrested I-PAC co-founder and director Vinesh Chandel after questioning

title: Indian democracy will be stronger, vibrant if women quota implemented in 2029: PM Modi
content: In a letter to the women of the country, Mr. Modi also said that with women excelling in several fields, it is only fitting that there is an increase in the participation of women in legislative bodies

title: Development in West Bengal leaves much to be desired | Data
content: Economic indicators lag, with low incomes and weak rural wages dragging down overall development in the poll-bound State; health indicators fare better

title: Dispute between dermatologists, dentists takes a legal turn in Kerala
content: The disagreement is over who is authorised to perform hair transplantation and aesthetic and cosmetic surgeries

title: Kadapa court sentences 20 years imprisonment to accused in POCSO case
content: A Kadapa POCSO court has sentenced Palla Venkata Vidya Kiran, 35, to twenty years’ rigorous imprisonment for attempting to rape a minor girl in 2021

title: A long-awaited respite for Bastar village as it gets tap water
content: Narayanpur Collector Namrata Jain said that a water supply system had been set up in the village under the Jal Jeevan Mission

title: Over 5,000 properties acquired in Hyderabad for road widening over the past two decades
content: A total 2,024 properties, accounting for 39% of the total, were acquired on the three Metro Rail corridors, to facilitate laying the railway lines

title: Former Haryana CM Hooda blames low procurement of crop on government’s “arbitrary” new rules
content: Hooda has also issued directives to all Congress MLAs and senior leaders regarding this matter, and instructed them to visit all grain markets daily, summon officials to the site, and confront them with the ground realities

title: Need for law, medicine coordination highlighted at interdisciplinary dialogue in Jodhpur
content: Experts addressing the event called for evolving a safe, transparent and legally robust healthcare system

title: Kerala dental student’s death highlights growing threat of predatory loan apps
content: Investigators say the student had taken a loan of around ₹14,000 from an app and recovery agents had been contacting him repeatedly. They also purportedly directed calls and messages to a college teacher in an attempt to shame the youngster and coerce repayment

title: PM calls for dialogue, cooperation to amend women’s quota law
content: Prime Minister says the Opposition had insisted that the women’s reservation Act must be implemented by 2029, and the government has taken the concerns seriously

title: 11 people killed in the truck-taxi accident in Kalyan
content: The accident occurred around 11 a.m. on the Murbad–Kalyan road on National Highway 61 near Gavli village

title: Delimitation will not affect southern States, says Goyal
content: There will be proportional increase of seats across the country due to delimitation and ‘everybody is back to where they were’, says the Union Minister of Commerce and Industry; he also defends the National Education Policy, says T.N. has failed to reach its ‘true potential’ under DMK govt.

title: Resisting amendment can be more harmful for southern States
content: The BJP’s proposal is to have 50% additional seats in the Lok Sabha, one-third of the new total being reserved for women, nationally and in each State; for instance, Kerala, which at present has 20 seats, will have 30 seats, of which ten will be reserved for women.

title: Owaisi condemns ‘exploitation’ of Muslim vote at campaign rally
content: Sharpens attack on both Mamata and Kabir for ‘grave injustice’ towards Muslims of Bengal and using them as a vote bank

title: SC asks NIA to check the political background of people involved in Malda gherao case
content: ‘This is not an academic exercise. We intend to take this into its logical conclusion,’ Chief Justice of India Surya Kant, heading the Bench, says

title: Kejriwal seeks Justice Sharma’s recusal in excise case; Centre calls plea ‘contemptuous’
content: Former Delhi Chief Minister objects to Justice Swarna Kanta Sharma’s reported attendance at four events organised by Akhil Bharatiya Adhivakta Parishad

title: Three-day parole for ‘Savukku’ Shankar to attend mother’s funeral
content: The parole was sanctioned after a petition was submitted by Mr. Shankar’s counsel on April 13, 2026, stating that the detenu’s mother had passed away on Monday

title: Subhas Chandra Bose: the paradox of a revolutionary’s theory and praxis
content: The leader synthesised Indian spirituality with Hegelian dialectics, evolving from an absolute idealist into a pragmatic revolutionary seeking to build a modern, socialist India — an analysis on Bose’s journey through philosophy, politics, and his plans for society and national regeneration

title: ED arrests I-PAC director in West Bengal coal 'scam' case
content: An official said Chandel was taken into custody under the provisions of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) in Delhi late evening

title: CBI tracks down fugitive in 2014 Kolkata disappearance case to Surat
content: The accused had been living in Surat using fake identity documents in the name of Amit Sharma. The agency produced him before a local court there to get his transit remand to Kolkata.

title: TCS Nashik case: two suspended employees masterminds, say police
content: Tata Sons chairman N. Chandrasekaran announced that a thorough investigation is underway under TCS' Chief Operating Officer Arathi Subramanian to establish the facts and identify individuals responsible for the situation.

title: IMD’s April forecast projects monsoon to be ‘below normal’ for first time in 11 years
content: El Nino conditions are likely after June, the IMD said. Historically, six out of 10 El Nino years have been linked to depressed rainfall over India.

title: PM Modi inaugurates Delhi-Dehradun expressway: Check route, toll, travel time
content: Delhi-Dehradun Expressway: Passing through Delhi, Uttar Pradesh and Uttarakhand, the route is expected to bring down the current travel time of over six hours to roughly two and a half hours, according to an official statement.

title: Petrol, diesel losses: What oil firms are losing amid Hormuz supply squeeze
content: India's state-run oil companies are incurring significant losses, estimated at Rs 18 per litre on petrol and Rs 35 on diesel, due to unchanged retail prices amidst volatile global crude oil prices. Despite a government excise duty cut, these firms continue to face mounting financial strain, with potential price hikes anticipated post-state elections.

title: How much will Iran lose? The cost of Trump’s Hormuz blockade
content: Following failed talks, the US has imposed a blockade on Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz, potentially costing Iran $435 million daily in economic damage, primarily from lost oil and petrochemical exports. This move, aimed at pressuring Iran, could also impact China's energy imports and requires significant US naval commitment to enforce.

title: OpenAI tells employees that partnership with Amazon is 'future' and Microsoft 'past'
content: OpenAI chief revenue officer Denise Dresser sent a four-page internal memo to staff on Sunday, signalling a clear shift in the company's cloud allegiances—Amazon is now the enterprise growth engine, while Microsoft has "limited" its reach. The memo touts "staggering" inbound demand since the $50 billion Amazon partnership was announced in February. Meanwhile, Microsoft insists nothing has changed—and is reportedly weighing legal action to prove it.

title: POSH failure at TCS Nashik? HR AGM arrested for 'ignoring' complaints; emails, chats under scanner
content: A major probe into alleged sexual harassment at a Nashik TCS BPO unit has led to nine FIRs and multiple arrests, including a senior HR official. Eight women employees reported misconduct and inaction by HR. Investigators are scrutinizing digital evidence and internal processes, with TCS assuring strict action and suspending accused employees.

title: Virat Kohli’s ‘very slow knock’ under fire, ex-cricketer questions RCB star
content: Aakash Chopra criticised Virat Kohli’s slow 50 off 38 balls in RCB’s win over Mumbai Indians, calling it “unbecoming” despite the result. He also questioned Kohli’s mindset and noted wasted reviews. Chopra praised Phil Salt’s explosive 78 and Rajat Patidar’s striking form, highlighting their key roles in RCB’s 18-run victory.

title: TCS CEO on IT dying by 2030: Companies will need more services for AI
content: TCS CEO K Krithivasan dismisses predictions of India's IT sector becoming obsolete by 2030, asserting that AI will amplify the need for IT services. He highlights the industry's resilience due to deep skill sets, not just cost.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ day 26: Ranveer Singh-starrer beats ‘Jawan’, ‘Stree 2’
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' has achieved remarkable box office success, nearing ₹1,100 crore net in India and ₹1,720 crore gross worldwide after 26 days. The spy drama's impressive fourth-week collection of ₹40.2 crore has positioned it as the 4th highest grosser in that period, surpassing 'Jawan' and 'Stree 2'.

title: Trump’s blockade of Strait of Hormuz begins: How will India be impacted?
content: The Strait of Hormuz is a narrow stretch which is important for global trade flows, and is alone responsible for the transit of a fifth of the world’s oil supply. Asian economies like India and China source a big chunk of their crude oil, LPG, and LNG requirements via this strait.

title: Anthropic’s new AI model Mythos sparks fears in Canada, AI minister says: We are taking this seriously
content: Canada is grappling with significant cybersecurity concerns over Anthropic's new AI model, Claude Mythos. Regulators and top banks met to discuss its potential to weaponize software vulnerabilities, with experts warning of profound risks if misused. The government is engaging with Anthropic, emphasizing the need for trusted international partners and security in its upcoming AI strategy.

title: 'Muh utha ke nahi maar sakte': Babar triggered by strike-rate question - Watch
content: Babar, however, could not find rhythm and was dismissed for 18 off 20 balls. Babar Azam's slow strike rate in T20s has been a topic of discussion in recent times, and Steve Smith denying him a single in the Big Bash League (BBL) earlier was a topic of discussion in cricketing circles.

title: Puthandu 2026: Best Tamil new year messages, quotes, wishes and images to share
content: Puthandu, the Tamil New Year, is celebrated on April 14th, 2026, marking a time for family gatherings, traditional feasts like mango pachadi, and welcoming prosperity. This ancient festival, rooted in the solar calendar and legends, blends Hindu traditions, agrarian joy, and enduring family bonds, offering a cultural reset for all.

title: ‘Blank mind’ & bold leap: How Harika Dronavalli cracked freestyle chess on debut
content: In a nation where only four women have ever earned the GM title, 35-year-old Harika remains one of its most enduring pillars. As her compatriots prepare for the traditional grind of World Championship cycles, Harika has qualified for the inaugural FIDE Women’s Freestyle Chess World Championship, which is set to take place next year.

title: TCS Nashik row: Undercover op reveals sex abuse, religious pressure; firm vows 'zero tolerance'
content: A tip-off about a Hindu woman observing Ramzan fasts at a TCS Nashik BPO unit triggered a police investigation. Undercover operations led to arrests of seven employees amid allegations of sexual exploitation, religious coercion, and workplace harassment. TCS has suspended employees and launched an internal probe.

title: 'Picture abhi baaki hai': Iran's Bollywood jab at Trump; warns missile boats 'warming up'
content: Iran's consulate in Mumbai pushed back on US President Donald Trump's claims of its navy being "finished." Showcasing fast missile boats and referencing a Shah Rukh Khan movie dialogue, Iran warned the US that "the movie is still left," asserting their defense systems remain operational and control over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Should Vaibhav Sooryavanshi be picked for Ireland tour?
content: "He is in contention for the Ireland tour and the selectors have shortlisted his name along with those of many other players," a BCCI source was quoted as saying by the Indian Express.

title: Where are gold prices headed amid US-Iran peace talks failure? Check outlook for today
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices may trade range-bound with a bearish bias as a breakthrough in US-Iran peace talks remains elusive, says Praveen Singh, Head Currencies and Commodities, Mirae Asset ShareKhan.

title: ‘To be honest…’: Riyan Parag breaks silence after heavy defeat to SRH
content: Riyan Parag termed Rajasthan Royals’ heavy loss to Sunrisers Hyderabad a “blip” after a dramatic top-order collapse. He credited SRH’s debutant pacers for their impact, reflected on tactical decisions, and praised his team’s fightback after being 9/5. Parag remained optimistic, backing RR to recover quickly and perform better in their next match.

title: China exports stumble, imports surge amid Iran war; US shipments down 26.5%
content: China's export growth significantly decelerated to 2.5% in March, falling short of expectations and marking the weakest performance in six months. This slowdown is attributed to rising global energy costs and supply disruptions stemming from the Middle East conflict. Conversely, imports surged by 27.8%, indicating robust domestic demand despite geopolitical uncertainties.

title: Asha Bhosle's granddaughter Zanai Bhosle expresses gratitude for honoring her grandmother
content: Zanai Bhosle paid an emotional tribute to her grandmother Asha Bhosle after her passing. In a heartfelt Instagram post, she thanked people for their love and respect, calling the legendary singer deserving of every honour. Sharing a funeral image, she expressed that Asha Bhosle lives on in everyone’s hearts and will always be remembered. Read on to know more in detail.

title: 20-yr pause of uranium enrichment & Tehran's counter: How US–Iran talks collapsed at the last mile
content: Peace talks between the US and Iran have stalled over uranium enrichment curbs, with Washington proposing a 20-year freeze and Tehran offering five years. Disagreements also arose regarding the scope of a potential deal, including Hormuz and sanctions relief, despite initial hopes for a breakthrough.

title: ‘Watch out for sharks’: Sooryavanshi gets warning after golden duck
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making waves in IPL 2026 with explosive batting. Former pacer Simon Doull warns the young star about management companies prioritizing profit over his long-term career. Doull advises Sooryavanshi to be cautious of external influences and surround himself with people who genuinely care about his development and longevity.

title: 'Will be gross injustice if delayed': PM Modi urges support for women’s reservation bill
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has addressed the women of India, emphasizing "Nari Shakti" and the government's commitment to women's reservation in legislative bodies. He highlighted the upcoming special Parliament session to pass a constitutional amendment for the Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam, aiming for its full implementation by the 2029 elections.

title: Out for golden duck vs SRH, Sooryavanshi 'not happy' with RR's this decision
content: The teen prodigy has been the flavour of this season in the T20 tournament with two 15-ball fifties including in the previous match and key to Rajasthan's four wins.

title: Ambedkar Jayanti 2026: Images, quotes, messages, cards and GIFs for sharing
content: Ambedkar Jayanti on April 14th transcends mere remembrance, urging a deep dive into B.R. Ambedkar's enduring ideas on equality, access, and dignity. His fight against caste discrimination and his role in shaping the Indian Constitution remain profoundly relevant. The day calls for reflection on his vision and its continued impact on contemporary Indian society.

title: UP govt hikes minimum wages after Noida protests; revised rates effective from April 1
content: Following recent unrest, the Uttar Pradesh government has approved a significant increase in minimum wages for all worker categories, implemented retrospectively from April 1. This decision, approved by the CM, aims to address demands for higher pay and better conditions after large-scale factory worker protests.

title: 'I do make people better': Trump explains why he deleted post depicting him as Jesus
content: Former US President Donald Trump faced backlash for an AI image showing him as a Jesus-like figure. He later explained it was meant to portray him as a doctor healing people. The image, which sparked criticism from supporters and others, was eventually deleted. Trump dismissed the negative reactions as fake news.

title: Will MS Dhoni play today against KKR? Latest update on CSK keeper's return
content: CSK registered their first victory after an all-round effort against Delhi Capitals. Sanju Samson scored 115 off 56 balls, his first major contribution for the franchise, while the bowlers also did their job.

title: 'Don't forget you work in BJP states': Suvendu Adhikari's warning to migrant workers in Nandigram
content: Opposition leader Suvendu Adhikari warned Muslim migrant workers in Nandigram that they might lose work in BJP-governed states after the assembly polls. He cited the presence of thousands of workers in Gujarat, Maharashtra, and Odisha, all ruled by the BJP. The TMC criticized Adhikari's remarks as threats and intimidation, vowing to report the matter to the Election Commission.

title: What these UK tourists do to sustain their travel in India will surprise you
content: In Jaisalmer, two UK tourists redefined travel by working four hours daily at a hotel restaurant for free accommodation and food. This unique approach allowed them to deeply immerse themselves in local culture and skills, demonstrating a remarkable mindset towards labor. Their story highlights a refreshing perspective on work, dignity, and exploration, inspiring many.

title: NFL reporter Melanie Collins stuns fans with offseason beach snap
content: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.

title: "Is It Epstein Being Cared For?" Iran's Dig At Trump Over "Jesus" Image
content: US President Donald Trump uploaded an image which showed him dressed in a white robe and placing a glowing hand on the forehead of a man lying in a hospital bed.

title: "Indian Memes Are GOAT": Iran Mocks US' Hormuz Blockade With 'Dhamaal' Video
content: Amid continued crossfire in the Middle East, Iranian diplomatic handles on X have launched a different kind of 'war' against the United States and Donald Trump -- using memes and takedowns posted.

title: UP Bride Demands 90 Lakhs From Groom On Wedding Night, Death Threats Follow
content: Gaurav and Kalpana, both residents of Agra, got married nearly a year ago on April 29, but the wedding did not last even a day.

title: Telangana Cops Launch Safety Audits In Hyderabad Amid TCS Nashik Harassment Case
content: Telangana Police order safety audits in Hyderabad IT offices and PG hostels after Nashik harassment case.

title: Opinion: Opinion: The Great North-South Debate, And Prickly Questions About 'Fairness'
content: A strict population-based delimitation could produce a Lok Sabha in which a handful of large northern Hindi-belt states hold a permanent majority, enabling them to shape national policies even against the preferences of the rest of the country.

title: Samrat Choudhary Leads Probables' List In Bihar Chief Ministerial Race
content: Nitish Kumar, now a Rajya Sabha member, is set to resign today as Bihar Chief Minister, clearing the way for a new leader at the helm, likely from the BJP, its ally both at the state and Centre.

title: 2 MBA Students Die After Drug Overdose At Mumbai Concert
content: A 24-year-old female student and a 28-year-old male student died in the hospital, while a 25-year-old woman is in a critical condition.

title: Delhi-Dehradun Expressway Inaugurated: Route, Travel Time, Features Explained
content: Built at an estimated cost of around Rs 12,000 crore, the Delhi-Dehradun Expressway will begin near the Akshardham Temple in Delhi and end in Dehradun.

title: QR Codes And WhatsApp Groups: How Noida Protests Were Planned Overnight
content: Noida protests: Inflammatory, inciting content and messages were circulated in the groups to intensify the protests, officials said.

title: Telangana Cop Dies After Being Run Over By Own Patrol Vehicle, Probe Ordered

title: Live Updates - Nitish Kumar Chairs His Last Bihar Cabinet Meeting, Set To Resign

title: Baby's Body Detached During "Forced Delivery" In UP, Severed Head Left In Womb
content: Instead of waiting for a specialist doctor, a female healthcare worker - an ASHA worker - present in the ambulance, administered a painkiller injection into Prema Devi and forcibly attempted delivery.

title: Delhi-Dehradun Expressway: Property Prices To Rise 15-25%, These Towns Benefit The Most

title: Saudi Arabia Is "Pressing" US To Drop Iran Port Blockade Plan: Report
content: Saudi Arabia has managed to get its oil exports up by piping its crude across the desert to the Red Sea, while Iran's Hormuz blockade persisted. Riyadh is worried those supplies would be at risk if the Red Sea's exit route were also closed.
